metadata.title: FocusNow — See Where Your Time Goes | Free Desktop Tracker
metadata.description: Free desktop app that automatically tracks your apps and shows how you spend your workday. AES-256 encrypted. Mac & Windows.
metadata.keywords: focus tracking app, automatic time tracking desktop, app usage tracker mac, deep work tracker, productivity, pomodoro

hero.title: Where Does Your Day Actually Go?
hero.description: FocusNow quietly tracks your apps and shows you exactly how you spend your workday. See your most productive hours, spot time sinks, and build better habits — automatically.

meta.title: Download FocusNow Free — Mac & Windows
meta.description: Download FocusNow for free. Automatic focus and time tracking for macOS and Windows. Installs in under a minute.

items: macOS 12 (Monterey) or later
Apple Silicon or Intel
50 MB disk space

windows.title: Windows
items: Windows 10 or later
64-bit processor
50 MB disk space

permissions.title: Grant Permissions
permissions.description: FocusNow needs accessibility permissions to track which app is in the foreground. We never read content — just the app name.

run.title: Let It Run
run.description: FocusNow works silently in the background. Go about your normal workday.

dashboard.title: Check Your Dashboard
dashboard.description: Open FocusNow anytime to see your focus stats, top apps, and productivity trends.

items.question: Is this spyware?
items.answer: No. FocusNow only tracks which app is in the foreground and for how long. It never takes screenshots, records keystrokes, or reads what you type. Your data is encrypted with AES-256 and only you can see it.

items.question: How much CPU and battery does it use?
items.answer: Very little. FocusNow is designed to run silently in the background. It checks the active window at regular intervals and uses minimal system resources — you won't notice it's there.

items.question: Can my employer see my data?
items.answer: No. FocusNow is a personal productivity tool. Your data is encrypted and stored in your own account. No one else — including us — can access your activity data.

items.question: Is it really free?
items.answer: Yes. The core product is free forever with no credit card required. We plan to offer an optional Pro tier in the future with advanced features, but the free plan will always include everything you need.

meta.title: Pricing — FocusNow Is Free Forever
meta.description: FocusNow is free to use with no credit card required. Automatic tracking, focus sessions, analytics, and encrypted sync included.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent

meta.title: About FocusNow — Our Story and Mission
meta.description: FocusNow was born from a simple idea: understand your productivity without giving up your privacy. Learn about our mission.

about.title: About
about.description: FocusNow was born from a simple idea: you should be able to understand your productivity without giving up your privacy.

story.title: Our Story
story.content: Most productivity tracking tools either lack depth or compromise your privacy. We thought there had to be a better way. FocusNow gives you powerful insights into how you spend your time, with all your data encrypted and securely stored.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.content: To help people understand and improve their focus through intelligent, privacy-respecting technology. We believe that personal productivity data should stay personal.

tech.title: Built With
items: Electron
React
TypeScript
Azure Cosmos DB
Tailwind CSS

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.intro: FocusNow ("we", "our", or "us") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy covers both the FocusNow website and desktop application. It explains what data we collect, how we use and store it, and what rights you have regarding your personal information. This policy is prepared in accordance with applicable data protection laws. We encourage you to read this policy carefully to understand how we handle your data.

trustPromise.title: 1. Our Privacy Promise
trustPromise.content: At FocusNow, we believe your productivity data is deeply personal. Before anything else, here is our commitment to you:
items: We never sell, rent, or trade your personal data
We never share your activity data with advertisers or data brokers
We never take screenshots of your screen
We never record keystrokes, mouse clicks, or form inputs
We never use your data for advertising or marketing profiling
You can delete all your data at any time — permanently and irreversibly

dataController.title: 2. Data Controller
dataController.content: FocusNow is developed and operated by Barbaros Zongur, based in Turkey. As the data controller, we are responsible for deciding how your personal data is processed. For all privacy-related inquiries, you can reach us at privacy@focusnow.ai.

collection.title: 3. Information We Collect
collection.content: We collect only the minimum data necessary to provide you with productivity insights. Here is exactly what we collect and why:
items: Account Information — your email address, display name, and authentication credentials (to create and manage your account)
Activity Data — active application names, window titles, focus session durations, productivity categories, and daily usage patterns (to generate your productivity analytics)
Device Information — operating system type, app version, and device identifier (for service functionality and troubleshooting)

usage.title: 4. How We Use Your Data
usage.content: We use your data exclusively to provide and improve the FocusNow experience:
items: Provide automatic productivity categorization and analytics dashboards
Sync your data across devices for seamless access to your productivity history
Generate personalized focus insights and productivity reports
Send service-related communications (updates, security alerts)
Diagnose technical issues and improve app performance
usage.note: We do not use your activity data for advertising, marketing profiling, or any purpose unrelated to the FocusNow service.

storage.title: 5. Data Storage and Infrastructure
storage.content: Your data is stored securely in Microsoft Azure Cosmos DB, a globally distributed enterprise-grade database service:
items: All data encrypted at rest using AES-256 encryption
All data encrypted in transit using TLS 1.2+
Azure compliance certifications: SOC 1/2/3, ISO 27001, GDPR-ready infrastructure
Physical and logical access controls at all data centers
A local copy of your data is maintained on your device for offline access

internationalTransfers.title: 6. International Data Transfers
internationalTransfers.content: FocusNow is operated from Turkey. Your data may be processed in Microsoft Azure data centers located in the European Union. For any transfers outside the European Economic Area (EEA) or Turkey, we rely on Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs) and other appropriate safeguards recognized by applicable data protection authorities. Microsoft Azure is our sole infrastructure provider and processes data under a Data Processing Agreement that includes safeguards for international transfers.

security.title: 7. Data Security
security.content: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your data:
items: AES-256 encryption at rest for all stored data
TLS 1.2+ encryption for all data in transit
Secure authentication with hashed and salted credentials — we never store plain-text passwords
Role-based access controls limiting data access to authorized systems only
Regular security audits and infrastructure monitoring
security.note: No system is 100% secure. We take reasonable and appropriate measures to protect your information from unauthorized access, alteration, or destruction.

sharing.title: 8. Data Sharing and Third Parties
sharing.content: We do not sell, rent, or trade your personal data. We share data only in these limited circumstances:
items: Microsoft Azure (infrastructure provider) — processes data on our behalf under strict contractual obligations and a Data Processing Agreement
Legal requirements — when required by law, regulation, legal process, or governmental request
Business transfers — in the event of a merger, acquisition, or sale of assets, your data may be transferred as part of that transaction, with advance notification to you

cookies.title: 9. Cookies and Tracking Technologies
cookies.content: Here is how we use tracking technologies across the FocusNow website and desktop application:
items: Essential cookies — session management and authentication on the website (strictly necessary, no consent required)

Google Analytics — we use Google Analytics to understand how visitors interact with our website (pages visited, traffic sources, country). This data is anonymous and aggregated. Google's privacy policy: https://policies.google.com/privacy

Desktop app analytics — we collect aggregated usage statistics in the desktop app (app version, OS, feature usage frequency, crash reports). This data contains no personally identifiable information or activity content such as application names or window titles
No advertising cookies or third-party ad trackers
No social media tracking pixels or embedded trackers
cookies.note: You can decline analytics cookies via the cookie banner on your first visit. Desktop app analytics can be disabled in the app settings.

retention.title: 10. Data Retention
retention.content: We keep your data only as long as necessary:
items: Active account — your data is retained while your account is active and you use our services
After account deletion — personal data is deleted or anonymized within 30 days
Legal retention — certain data may be retained longer where required by applicable law
Aggregated anonymous data — may be retained indefinitely for service improvement (this data cannot identify you)

rights.title: 11. Your Rights
rights.content: You have the following rights regarding your personal data:
items: Access — request a copy of the personal data we hold about you
Rectification — request correction of inaccurate or incomplete data
Erasure — request deletion of your account and all associated data
Data portability — export your data in a machine-readable format
Restriction — request that we limit processing of your data
Objection — object to processing based on legitimate interest
Withdrawal of consent — withdraw consent for optional processing at any time via app settings
Lodge a complaint — file a complaint with your local data protection authority
rights.note: To exercise these rights, email privacy@focusnow.ai. We will respond within 30 days.

children.title: 12. Children's Privacy
children.content: FocusNow is not intended for use by children under the age of 13 (or the applicable minimum age in your jurisdiction). We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If we become aware that we have collected data from a child without parental consent, we will take steps to delete that information promptly.

changes.title: 13. Changes to This Policy
changes.content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time to reflect changes in our practices, technology, or legal requirements. When we make material changes, we will notify you through the app or via email before the changes take effect. Your continued use of FocusNow after the changes become effective constitutes your acceptance of the updated policy.

contact.title: 14. Contact Us
contact.content: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or wish to exercise your data rights:
items: Email: privacy@focusnow.ai
Response time: within 30 days of receiving your request
contact.note: Data Controller: FocusNow — Barbaros Zongur, Turkey

meta.title: Focus Tracker for Remote Workers
meta.description: See if remote work is actually working for you. Track your focus, find your productive hours, and build better work-from-home habits.

remoteWorkers.title: See If Remote Work Is
remoteWorkers.description: Working from home means more freedom — and more distractions. FocusNow shows you exactly how your remote workday looks, so you can make it better.

painPoints.title: Sound Familiar?
items: You feel busy all day but can't point to what you accomplished
Home distractions eat into your deep work time without you realizing
You're not sure if you're more or less productive than in the office
Work bleeds into evenings because you lost focus during the day

solution.title: How FocusNow Helps
items: See your real productive hours vs. time lost to distractions
Find your peak focus times and protect them
Track work-life boundaries — know when to stop
Build evidence that remote work works for you

meta.title: Focus Tracker for Students
meta.description: Track your study sessions and find where your time goes. Build better study habits with automatic focus tracking.

students.title: Where Do Your Study Hours
students.description: You sit down to study for 3 hours, but how much of that is actual focus? FocusNow tracks your screen time automatically so you can study smarter.

painPoints.title: Sound Familiar?
items: You plan to study for hours but end up on social media
You don't know which subjects eat the most time
Exam season feels chaotic — you're never sure if you studied enough
You can't tell if your study methods are actually working

solution.title: How FocusNow Helps
items: See exactly how long you actually study vs. get distracted
Track which apps you use during study time
Use focus sessions with timers to stay on task
Review weekly trends to improve your study habits

meta.title: Focus Tracker for Freelancers
meta.description: Know exactly where every hour goes. Track your work across projects and clients with automatic desktop tracking.

freelancers.title: Know Exactly Where
freelancers.description: As a freelancer, your time is your income. FocusNow tracks your work automatically so you always know how you're spending it.

painPoints.title: Sound Familiar?
items: You underestimate how long tasks take and underprice your work
Admin and communication eat hours you can't bill for
You switch between projects and lose track of time
End of month, you wonder where all your hours went

solution.title: How FocusNow Helps
items: See real time spent on each app and project
Identify unbillable time sinks like email and Slack
Track your most productive hours to schedule important work
Build data to price your services accurately

meta.title: Focus Tracker for Developers
meta.description: Track your coding time, code review hours, and meeting overhead. See your real development workflow.

developers.title: Is That Code Review Really
developers.description: Between coding, code reviews, meetings, and Slack, it's hard to know where your day actually goes. FocusNow shows you the real picture.

painPoints.title: Sound Familiar?
items: Meetings and code reviews fragment your deep work time
You feel like you coded all day but shipped nothing
Context switching between PRs, Slack, and IDE kills your flow
You can't quantify how much time you spend in actual development

solution.title: How FocusNow Helps
items: See time in IDE vs. browser vs. communication tools
Track deep coding sessions and protect your flow state
Identify meeting overhead and context-switching costs
Build data to advocate for more focus time
